en.heroEyebrow: UK personal tax · spicy but safe
en.heroTitle: Play the UK tax game — legally, plainly, with receipts.
en.heroBody: Rich people do not have magic. They know rules, wrappers, timing, residence and reliefs. TaxSorted teaches the game without helping anyone cheat it.
en.thresholdScannerTitle: Threshold scanner — legal levers, no fake loopholes
en.thresholdScannerBody: The engine scans adjusted net income pressure points and suggests lawful moves with caveats. No hiding income, no sham invoices, no pretend residence.
en.politicsTitle: Deep politics: who wrote the game board?
en.politicsBody: UK personal tax is politics expressed as thresholds. The loud fight is rates; the quiet machinery is frozen allowances, clawbacks and who gets timing choices.

zh-HK.heroEyebrow: UK 個税 · 辣但安全
zh-HK.heroTitle: 玩爆英國個税 — 合法、講人話、有 receipts。
zh-HK.heroBody: 有錢人唔係識魔法；佢哋識 rules、wrappers、timing、residence、reliefs。TaxSorted 教你睇穿個 game，但唔教人呃稅。
zh-HK.thresholdScannerTitle: Threshold scanner — 合法工具，唔係假 loophole
zh-HK.thresholdScannerBody: Engine 會掃 adjusted net income 壓力位，再講合法 moves 同 caveats。唔藏收入、唔假 invoice、唔扮 residence。
zh-HK.politicsTitle: Deep politics：邊個寫咗個 game board？
zh-HK.politicsBody: 英國個税好多時係 thresholds 包住嘅政治。表面嗌 rates；靜雞雞最勁係 freeze allowances、clawbacks、同邊個有 timing choices。

zh-CN.heroEyebrow: 英国个人税 · 有趣但守法
zh-CN.heroTitle: 把英国个人税规则玩明白 — 合法、清楚、有来源。
zh-CN.heroBody: 有钱人不是会魔法；他们懂规则、税务包装、时间安排、居住身份和减免。TaxSorted 教你看懂游戏，但不帮助逃税。
zh-CN.thresholdScannerTitle: 阈值扫描器 — 合法工具，不是假漏洞
zh-CN.thresholdScannerBody: 引擎扫描 adjusted net income 压力点，并给出带边界说明的合法动作。不隐瞒收入、不做假发票、不伪造居住身份。
zh-CN.politicsTitle: 深挖政治：谁设计了这张游戏板？
zh-CN.politicsBody: 英国个人税常常是以阈值表达的政治。公开争论的是税率；安静运转的是冻结免税额、追回机制，以及谁拥有选择时间点的能力。

pl.heroEyebrow: UK personal tax · pikantnie, ale bezpiecznie
pl.heroTitle: Graj w brytyjski podatek legalnie, jasno i z dowodami.
pl.heroBody: Bogaci nie mają magii. Znają zasady, wrappers, timing, residence i reliefs. TaxSorted uczy gry, ale nie pomaga oszukiwać.
pl.thresholdScannerTitle: Skaner progów — legalne dźwignie, zero fałszywych loopholes
pl.thresholdScannerBody: Silnik skanuje punkty nacisku adjusted net income i pokazuje legalne ruchy z caveats. Bez ukrywania dochodu, bez fikcyjnych faktur, bez udawanej rezydencji.
pl.politicsBody: UK personal tax to często polityka zapisana jako thresholds. Głośna walka to rates; cicha maszyna to frozen allowances, clawbacks i kto ma timing choices.

hi.heroEyebrow: UK personal tax · spicy but safe
hi.heroTitle: UK tax game खेलो — कानूनी, साफ़, receipts के साथ।
hi.heroBody: अमीर लोगों के पास magic नहीं; वे rules, wrappers, timing, residence और reliefs जानते हैं। TaxSorted खेल सिखाता है, cheating नहीं।
hi.thresholdScannerTitle: Threshold scanner — legal levers, fake loopholes नहीं
hi.thresholdScannerBody: Engine adjusted net income pressure points scan करता है और caveats के साथ lawful moves बताता है। Income hide नहीं, fake invoices नहीं, fake residence नहीं।
hi.politicsTitle: Deep politics: game board किसने लिखा?
hi.politicsBody: UK personal tax अक्सर thresholds में लिखी politics है। शोर rates पर होता है; असली मशीन frozen allowances, clawbacks और timing choices में है।

ur.heroEyebrow: UK personal tax · spicy مگر safe
ur.heroTitle: UK tax game کھیلیں — قانونی، صاف، receipts کے ساتھ۔
ur.heroBody: امیر لوگوں کے پاس جادو نہیں؛ وہ rules، wrappers، timing، residence اور reliefs جانتے ہیں۔ TaxSorted کھیل سکھاتا ہے، cheating نہیں۔
ur.thresholdScannerTitle: Threshold scanner — legal levers، fake loopholes نہیں
ur.thresholdScannerBody: Engine adjusted net income pressure points scan کرتا ہے اور caveats کے ساتھ lawful moves بتاتا ہے۔ Income hide نہیں، fake invoices نہیں، fake residence نہیں۔
ur.politicsTitle: Deep politics: game board کس نے لکھا؟
ur.politicsBody: UK personal tax اکثر thresholds میں لکھی politics ہے۔ شور rates پر ہوتا ہے؛ اصل مشین frozen allowances، clawbacks اور timing choices میں ہے۔

uk-60-percent-trap.en: The £100k trap: effective 60% Income Tax-only band before NI/student loans.
uk-60-percent-trap.zh-HK: £100k trap：表面 40%，因 personal allowance taper，Income Tax-only 邊際可以似 60%。
uk-60-percent-trap.zh-CN: £100k 陷阱：表面 40%，因为个人免税额递减，所得税边际效果可接近 60%。
uk-60-percent-trap.pl: Pułapka £100k: przez taper Personal Allowance marginalny Income Tax-only efekt może wyglądać jak 60%.
uk-60-percent-trap.hi: £100k trap: Personal Allowance taper की वजह से Income Tax-only marginal effect लगभग 60% जैसा लग सकता है।
uk-60-percent-trap.ur: £100k trap: Personal Allowance taper کی وجہ سے Income Tax-only marginal effect تقریباً 60% جیسا لگ سکتا ہے۔

uk-income-vs-gains-rate-gap.en: Work income and capital gains run through different lanes; ownership often has timing choices wages do not.
uk-income-vs-gains-rate-gap.zh-HK: 打工錢同資產增值係唔同 lane；有資產通常有 timing choice，打工通常冇。
uk-income-vs-gains-rate-gap.zh-CN: 工资收入和资本收益走不同通道；资产通常有时间选择，工资通常没有。
uk-income-vs-gains-rate-gap.pl: Dochód z pracy i capital gains jadą innymi pasami; ownership często ma timing choices, wages zwykle nie.
uk-income-vs-gains-rate-gap.hi: Work income और capital gains अलग lanes में चलते हैं; ownership में timing choices होती हैं, wages में कम।
uk-income-vs-gains-rate-gap.ur: Work income اور capital gains الگ lanes میں چلتے ہیں؛ ownership میں timing choices ہوتی ہیں، wages میں کم۔

uk-isa-wrapper.en: ISA is a simple legal wrapper: boring, powerful, unequal in practice because spare cash matters.
uk-isa-wrapper.zh-HK: ISA 係合法 shield：悶但勁；現實上有閒錢先用得盡。
uk-isa-wrapper.zh-CN: ISA 是合法保护壳：朴素但有效；现实中有余钱的人更能用满。
uk-isa-wrapper.pl: ISA to legalna tarcza: nudna, mocna, ale w praktyce nierówna, bo spare cash ma znaczenie.
uk-isa-wrapper.hi: ISA legal shield है: boring लेकिन powerful; practice में unequal क्योंकि spare cash matter करता है।
uk-isa-wrapper.ur: ISA legal shield ہے: boring مگر powerful؛ practice میں unequal کیونکہ spare cash matter کرتا ہے۔

uk-fig-non-dom-reform.en: Residence is a tax lever: the old non-dom remittance basis became a residence-based FIG regime from April 2025.
uk-fig-non-dom-reform.zh-HK: Residence 係大招：舊 non-dom remittance basis 由 2025 年 4 月起改成 residence-based FIG regime。
uk-fig-non-dom-reform.zh-CN: Residence 是关键杠杆：旧 non-dom remittance basis 从 2025 年 4 月起改为 residence-based FIG regime。
uk-fig-non-dom-reform.pl: Residence to mocna dźwignia: dawny non-dom remittance basis od kwietnia 2025 zastąpił residence-based FIG regime.
uk-fig-non-dom-reform.hi: Residence बड़ा lever है: पुराना non-dom remittance basis April 2025 से residence-based FIG regime बना।
uk-fig-non-dom-reform.ur: Residence بڑا lever ہے: پرانا non-dom remittance basis April 2025 سے residence-based FIG regime بنا۔

uk-badr-exit-rate.en: Founder exits can have their own CGT lane if BADR conditions are met; eligibility matters before the sale, not after.
uk-badr-exit-rate.zh-HK: Founder exit 有機會走自己嘅 CGT lane，但 BADR conditions 要賣之前已經 meet，唔係事後補戲。
uk-badr-exit-rate.zh-CN: Founder exit 可能有自己的 CGT 通道，但 BADR 条件要在出售前满足，不是事后补材料。
uk-badr-exit-rate.pl: Founder exit może mieć osobny pas CGT, jeśli warunki BADR są spełnione przed sprzedażą, nie po fakcie.
uk-badr-exit-rate.hi: Founder exit की अपनी CGT lane हो सकती है अगर BADR conditions sale से पहले meet हों, बाद में नहीं।
uk-badr-exit-rate.ur: Founder exit کی اپنی CGT lane ہو سکتی ہے اگر BADR conditions sale سے پہلے meet ہوں، بعد میں نہیں۔

uk-iht-threshold-planning.en: IHT is a timing-and-records game: real gifts, honest valuations, wills and thresholds matter years before death.
uk-iht-threshold-planning.zh-HK: IHT 係 timing 加 records game：真 gift、誠實 valuation、will 同 thresholds，死之前好多年已經重要。
uk-iht-threshold-planning.zh-CN: IHT 是 timing 和 records game：真实赠与、诚实估值、遗嘱和 thresholds，往往在去世前多年就重要。
uk-iht-threshold-planning.pl: IHT to gra czasu i dokumentów: prawdziwe gifts, uczciwe valuations, wills i thresholds liczą się lata wcześniej.
uk-iht-threshold-planning.hi: IHT timing और records का game है: real gifts, honest valuations, wills और thresholds कई साल पहले matter करते हैं।
uk-iht-threshold-planning.ur: IHT timing اور records کا game ہے: real gifts، honest valuations، wills اور thresholds کئی سال پہلے matter کرتے ہیں۔

uk-pension-relief-timing.en: Pensions are retirement first and tax timing second: powerful near cliffs, but annual allowance and taper rules bite.
uk-pension-relief-timing.zh-HK: Pension 第一係退休，第二先係 tax timing：近 cliff 好有力，但 annual allowance 同 taper 會咬人。
uk-pension-relief-timing.zh-CN: Pension 首先是退休，其次才是 tax timing：接近 cliff 时有力，但 annual allowance 和 taper 会咬人。
uk-pension-relief-timing.pl: Pension jest najpierw emeryturą, potem tax timing: mocne przy klifach, ale annual allowance i taper gryzą.
uk-pension-relief-timing.hi: Pension पहले retirement है, फिर tax timing: cliffs के पास powerful, पर annual allowance और taper bite करते हैं।
uk-pension-relief-timing.ur: Pension پہلے retirement ہے، پھر tax timing: cliffs کے پاس powerful، مگر annual allowance اور taper bite کرتے ہیں۔
